FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct MenuFlyoutItem

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A single row in a MenuFlyout: a label, an optional leading glyph (icon column), an enabled flag, the action to run when chosen, and an optional trailing keyboard-accelerator hint (e.g. "Ctrl+S"). Use Separator for a divider, Toggle(string, bool, Action?, string?, bool) for a checkable item (E73E check column), RadioItem(string, bool, Action?, string?, bool) for a mutually-exclusive choice (E915 bullet), or SubMenu(string, IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>, string?, bool) for a cascading sub-menu (E974 chevron column, hover/Right-arrow opens the nested popup). All non-Command extras are optional so the primary (Label, Glyph, Enabled, Invoke) constructor call-sites are unchanged.

public readonly record struct MenuFlyoutItem : IEquatable<MenuFlyoutItem>
Implements
IEquatable<MenuFlyoutItem>
Inherited Members

Constructors

MenuFlyoutItem(string, string?, bool, Action?)

A single row in a MenuFlyout: a label, an optional leading glyph (icon column), an enabled flag, the action to run when chosen, and an optional trailing keyboard-accelerator hint (e.g. "Ctrl+S"). Use Separator for a divider, Toggle(string, bool, Action?, string?, bool) for a checkable item (E73E check column), RadioItem(string, bool, Action?, string?, bool) for a mutually-exclusive choice (E915 bullet), or SubMenu(string, IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>, string?, bool) for a cascading sub-menu (E974 chevron column, hover/Right-arrow opens the nested popup). All non-Command extras are optional so the primary (Label, Glyph, Enabled, Invoke) constructor call-sites are unchanged.

public MenuFlyoutItem(string Label, string? Glyph = null, bool Enabled = true, Action? Invoke = null)

Parameters

Label string
Glyph string
Enabled bool
Invoke Action

Properties

AcceleratorText

Trailing right-aligned keyboard-accelerator text (WinUI KeyboardAcceleratorTextOverride), e.g. "Ctrl+S".

public string? AcceleratorText { get; init; }

MenuItemKind

Property Value

string

Separator 

public static MenuFlyoutItem Separator { get; }

Property Value

MenuFlyoutItem

SubItems

Nested items (Kind == SubMenu only) — the cascading sub-menu's rows.

public IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>? SubItems { get; init; }

Property Value

IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>

Methods

RadioItem(string, bool, Action?, string?, bool)

A mutually-exclusive command (WinUI RadioMenuFlyoutItem): an E915 bullet column whose glyph paints when selected.

public static MenuFlyoutItem RadioItem(string label, bool isChecked, Action? invoke = null, string? glyph = null, bool enabled = true)

Parameters

label string
isChecked bool
invoke Action
glyph string
enabled bool

Returns

MenuFlyoutItem

SubMenu(string, IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>, string?, bool)

A cascading sub-menu (WinUI MenuFlyoutSubItem): an E974 chevron in the trailing column (MenuFlyout_themeresources.xaml:720 SubItemChevron); hovering the row for MenuShowDelay (400ms default, MenuFlyout_Partial.h:13), clicking it, or Right-arrow opens the nested menu to the right.

public static MenuFlyoutItem SubMenu(string label, IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem> items, string? glyph = null, bool enabled = true)

Parameters

label string
items IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>
glyph string
enabled bool

Returns

MenuFlyoutItem

Toggle(string, bool, Action?, string?, bool)

A checkable command (WinUI ToggleMenuFlyoutItem): an E73E check column whose glyph paints only when on.

public static MenuFlyoutItem Toggle(string label, bool isChecked, Action? invoke = null, string? glyph = null, bool enabled = true)

Parameters

label string
isChecked bool
invoke Action
glyph string
enabled bool

Returns

MenuFlyoutItem
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
